name: arctium lappa
title: arctium lappa benefits
description: Arctium lappa fights cancer cells by inhibiting the growth and proliferation of malignant cells, thereby exerting a cytotoxic effect on cancerous tissues. This benefit is crucial because it can potentially lead to the prevention and treatment of various types of cancer, such as breast, lung, and colon cancer, thereby improving the quality of life and survival rates of cancer patients.
